name: City Medical Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; appears to be a very small NEMT/medical transport operator in SF Bayview area. Distinct from Bay City Medical Transportation and from citymedicaltransportation.org. Facebook page lists South San Francisco location.
fit_notes: 2-employee micro NEMT operator; not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope as a Summit tuck-in - no district contracts, no yellow-bus fleet.

name: Sierra Limousines
recent_news: Sierra Transportation Services has operated ~20 years in Tucson providing limos, executive sedans, group shuttles and coaches; no school-district contracts or special-needs student transport identified.
fit_notes: Luxury limo/charter operator, not a yellow-bus school contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in - no SPED/route contracts indicated.

name: A Legacy Limousine Svc
recent_news: Legacy Limousine & Sedan Service in South San Francisco listed on BBB (not accredited); no indication of school-district or special-needs student transport contracts.
fit_notes: Limo/sedan service, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Kinzy Limousine
recent_news: Belmont/South SF limousine operator; no school-bus or special-needs student transport contracts identified.
fit_notes: Limo service, not a school-bus contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Ride Right LLC
recent_news: Ride Right joined forces with sister company MTM and rebranded as MTM Transit in July 2019; operates as d/b/a per NLRB filings. No longer an independent entity.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target - owned by MTM Inc. (strategic transit/NEMT platform). Already consolidated; would only be available via carve-out from MTM, which is unlikely.
